name: Chocolate Chip Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. Add vegetable oil, egg yolks, cold water, and vanilla to the well.
4. Whisk egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Gradually fold the yolk mixture into the egg whites.
6. Gently fold in the chocolate until just combined.
7. Pour batter into a prepared angel food cake pan.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 50-60 minutes, or until set.
Mocha Frosting:
1. Combine cocoa and hot coffee.
2. Add butter and vanilla to the mixture.
3. Gradually add confectioner's sugar until the desired consistency is reached.
